LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CLUB ONE, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTS THE BURDEN OF PROOF BY SHOWING THE RELEASE LANGUAGE NEGATED DEFENDANTS DUTY TO PLAINTIFF. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED. NO SHOWING THE TERMS OF THE RELEASE ARE AMBIGUOUS, OR THAT THE TERM "FACILITY" IS UNCLEAR WITHIN THE CONTEXT OF THE RELEASE. THE COURT ADDS: RELEASE CLEAR AND COVERS OCCURRENCE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR 5797

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANCEY, SUSAN HANCEY, RICHARD TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CLUB ONE, INC. DBA CLUB ONE FITNESS CENTER (INCORRECTLY SUED HEREIN AS CLUB ONE INC AND CLUB ONE FITNESS CENTER, SEPARATELY) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF APPEAL/REQUEST FOR TRANSCRIPT (APPEAL ONLY) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANCEY, SUSAN HANCEY, RICHARD
NOTICE RE: DEFAULT

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2010 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CLUB ONE, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Michael B. Moore, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 956-6500 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Jeffery C. Long, Esq. of Prout Levanie (916) 443-4849 appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Defendant shifts the burden of proof by showing the release language negated defendants duty to plaintiff. No triable issue of fact raised. No showing the terms of the release are ambiguous, or that the term "facility" is unclear within the context of the release. The Court adds: Release clear and covers occurrence. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Set For Trial On Jul-19-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-30-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 318
